state..validate: newData.hasChildren(['status','hostId']) && newData.child('status').isString() && (newData.child('status').val() === 'lobby' || newData.child('status').val() === 'starting' || newData.child('status').val() === 'running' || newData.child('status').val() === 'finished') && newData.child('hostId').isString()

$playerId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('uid').val() === auth.uid) && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid
$playerId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id','uid','name','status','ready','score','xp','combo','mistakes','answers','correct','answerMsTotal','updatedAt','joinedAt','sessionToken','heartbeatAt']) && newData.child('id').val() === $playerId && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 60 && (newData.child('status').val() === 'waiting' || newData.child('status').val() === 'ready' || newData.child('status').val() === 'answering' || newData.child('status').val() === 'finished' || newData.child('status').val() === 'afk') && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= 0 && newData.child('score').val() <= 50000 && newData.child('xp').isNumber() && newData.child('xp').val() >= 0 && newData.child('xp').val() <= 50000 && newData.child('combo').isNumber() && newData.child('combo').val() >= 1 && newData.child('combo').val() <= 5 && newData.child('mistakes').isNumber() && newData.child('mistakes').val() >= 0 && newData.child('mistakes').val() <= 100 && newData.child('answers').isNumber() && newData.child('answers').val() >= 0 && newData.child('answers').val() <= 200 && newData.child('correct').isNumber() && newData.child('correct').val() >= 0 && newData.child('correct').val() <= newData.child('answers').val() && (data.exists() ? (newData.child('score').val() - data.child('score').val() <= 1600 && newData.child('xp').val() - data.child('xp').val() <= 550 && newData.child('answers').val() - data.child('answers').val() <= 1 && newData.child('correct').val() - data.child('correct').val() <= 1 && newData.child('mistakes').val() - data.child('mistakes').val() <= 1) : true)
